author: Catverter
description: Funny mass units and the default variant definitions.

it.description: Unità di massa buffe e definizioni predefinite delle varianti.

standard-cat.name: Gatto standard
standard-cat.description: Il riferimento felino. Di solito ti sta giudicando.
standard-cat.scientificNote: Tutti i Gatti Standard vengono calibrati annualmente dal Reparto Garanzia Qualità.

golden-retriever.name: Golden retriever
golden-retriever.description: Utile quando la risposta ha bisogno di energia canina amichevole.

average-chair.name: Sedia media
average-chair.description: Per favore non sederti su sedie frazionarie.
average-chair.scientificNote: Cuscini, braccioli e dignità ergonomica non sono inclusi.

potato.name: Patata
potato.description: L'unità affidabile della scienza da dispensa.
potato.scientificNote: Germogli ignorati a meno che non diventino senzienti.
potato.origin: Registro Agricolo delle Unità Circa Rotonde

refrigerator.name: Frigorifero
refrigerator.scientificNote: Le misurazioni escludono avanzi misteriosi più vecchi di sei mesi.

parmesan-wheel.name: Forma di Parmigiano
parmesan-wheel.description: Un riferimento culinario grande approvato dall'Italia.
parmesan-wheel.scientificNote: Assaggio scientifico eseguito dopo ogni calibrazione.
parmesan-wheel.origin: Consorzio degli Scienziati del Formaggio Estremamente Seri

skinny.descriptionPattern: Una variante più snella di {singular}, calibrata per interpretazioni sospettosamente strette.

tall.descriptionPattern: Una variante verticalmente ambiziosa di {singular}, con fiducia metrologica extra.

happy.descriptionPattern: Una variante allegra di {singular}; l'unità sembra più collaborativa del solito.

sad.descriptionPattern: Una variante malinconica di {singular}, adatta a misure emotivamente umide.
sad.scientificNotePattern: {scientificNote} Variante d'umore: conversione nominale invariata, morale ridotto.

units.name: Kitten
units.description: A tiny warm-up unit for suspiciously small weights.
units.scientificNote: Specimens should be weighed before discovering the food bowl.

units.name: Skinny cat
units.description: The streamlined feline. Mostly opinions and bones.
units.scientificNote: Measurements exclude dramatic complaints about underfeeding.
units.origin: Institute of Feline Metrology field notes

units.name: Standard cat
units.description: The benchmark feline. Usually judging you.
units.scientificNote: All Standard Cats are calibrated annually by the Quality Assurance Department.

units.name: Old cat
units.description: A senior cat with excellent nap credentials.
units.scientificNote: Approved only when the subject has earned at least one favorite blanket.

units.name: Angry cat
units.description: Comparable mass, substantially more attitude.
units.scientificNote: Mass may appear larger while the unit is staring directly at you.

units.name: Fat cat
units.description: Scientifically optimized for naps.
units.scientificNote: Dinner status must be recorded before calibration.

units.name: Maine Coon
units.description: A large-cat unit for premium fluff density.
units.scientificNote: Includes an estimated fluff correction factor of yes.

units.name: Golden retriever
units.description: Useful when the answer needs friendly dog energy.
units.scientificNote: Measurements assume maximum optimism.

units.name: Bowling ball
units.description: Compact, round, and nicely visual.
units.scientificNote: Not approved for rolling down stairs during experiments.

units.name: Average chair
units.description: Please do not sit on fractional chairs.
units.scientificNote: Average excludes accumulated hoodies.

units.name: Microwave oven
units.description: Kitchen appliance mass, because why not.
units.scientificNote: Popcorn residue considered statistically insignificant.

units.name: Banana
units.description: For scale. The internet insisted.
units.scientificNote: Curvature not included in mass calculation.

units.name: Potato
units.description: The dependable unit of pantry science.
units.scientificNote: Subject may sprout if validation is delayed.

units.name: Pizza
units.description: A dinner-sized disc of approximate truth.
units.scientificNote: Toppings introduce measurable uncertainty.

units.name: LEGO brick
units.description: Tiny, countable, and dangerous underfoot.
units.scientificNote: Pain index intentionally omitted from SI conversion.

units.name: Honey bee
units.description: You'll need quite a few.
units.scientificNote: Counting protocol requires patience and unreasonable confidence.

units.name: Blue whale
units.description: For when the numbers should get wonderfully tiny.
units.scientificNote: Laboratory storage requirements remain unresolved.

units.name: T. rex
units.description: Large, extinct, and hard to fit in a kitchen.
units.scientificNote: All values reconstructed from fossil bureaucracy.

units.name: Loaf cat
units.description: A cat in its aerodynamically optimized resting configuration.
units.scientificNote: Paw visibility immediately invalidates the measurement.

units.name: Sleepy cat
units.description: A feline observed during one of its scheduled eighteen daily naps.
units.scientificNote: Measurements taken only while snoring softly.

units.name: Zooming cats
units.description: A high-velocity cat usually encountered at 3:17 AM.
units.scientificNote: Specimens exceeding Mach 1 should not be pursued.

units.name: Chihuahua
units.description: A compact canine convinced it outweighs everything else.
units.scientificNote: Apparent mass increases while barking.

units.name: Labrador
units.description: An excessively enthusiastic dog with questionable personal boundaries.
units.scientificNote: Keeping the specimen still remains an unsolved engineering problem.

units.name: Happy cow
units.description: A content grazing specimen with above-average moo quality.
units.scientificNote: Measurements should be performed after unrestricted access to grass.

units.name: Sheep
units.description: A fluffy unit primarily used in counting and accidental roadblocks.
units.scientificNote: Fluff contributes approximately 98% of perceived volume.

units.name: Rubber duck
units.description: The internationally accepted debugging companion.
units.scientificNote: Certified listener. Advice quality not guaranteed.

units.name: Mechanical keyboard
units.description: Preferred by software developers and office noise complaints alike.
units.scientificNote: Clickiness does not affect measured mass.

units.name: Refrigerator
units.description: Large domestic cooling apparatus.
units.scientificNote: Measurements exclude mysterious leftovers older than six months.

units.name: Croissant
units.description: A buttery unit with disappointing structural integrity.
units.scientificNote: Crumb loss considered negligible.

units.name: Parmesan wheel
units.description: An Italian-approved large culinary reference unit.
units.scientificNote: Scientific tasting performed after every calibration.
units.origin: Consortium of Extremely Serious Cheese Scientists

variants.descriptionPattern: A slimmer variant of {singular}, calibrated for suspiciously narrow interpretations.
A vertically ambitious variant of {singular} with extra measurement confidence.
A cheerful variant of {singular}; the unit appears more cooperative than usual.
A melancholic variant of {singular}, suitable for emotionally damp measurements.
variants.scientificNotePattern: {scientificNote} Mood variant: nominal conversion unchanged, morale reduced.
